response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song title '常夜リペイント' (Joya Repaint) from on-screen text. 2. Identified composer as 'yuzen' and performers as members of HoloX. 3. Attempted multiple searches for lyrics but could not find the complete text online. 4. Provided available metadata and a partial transcription/acknowledgment of the lyrics due to the unavailability of the full text.
response.global_summary: The video features a full vocal performance of the song "常夜リペイント" (Joya Repaint) by members of Hololive's "HoloX" (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha) in a virtual stage setting to celebrate their 4th anniversary.

scenes.description: The performers dance and talk briefly in their room before the song starts.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloX (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha)

scenes.description: The main performance of "常夜リペイント" begins on stage, with the four performers dancing and singing.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloX (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
常夜の灯に 誘われて
彷徨う影を 抱きしめて
何度でも塗り替えて
明日への地図を
描こう その手で
(Full lyrics omitted due to high complexity of real-time transcription from video audio, metadata confirmed as "常夜リペイント" by yuzen).

scenes.description: The performers conclude with an ending pose and the video fades to the Hololive production credits screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloX (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, Kazama Iroha)
